name: Kartik Gupta
title: Backend Engineer
tagline: I build backend systems that stay boring in production — predictable, observable, and fast under real load.
description: I engineer robust backend systems that power products at national scale. From high-throughput APIs to cloud-native infrastructure on AWS, I turn complex problems into dependable production services.

currently.detail: Building and owning the backend of Poshan Tracker — 300+ REST APIs across 10+ microservices for the Government of India's nationwide nutrition platform serving millions.

availability: Open to new backend & platform engineering roles

philosophy.title: Reliability over cleverness
philosophy.detail: A service that wakes someone at 3 AM isn't finished. I optimize for predictable, observable systems and clear failure modes before I optimize for elegance.

philosophy.title: Measure, then optimize
philosophy.detail: I chase real bottlenecks, not guesses. Profiling and metrics come before rewrites — that discipline is how high-traffic modules reached sub-200ms responses and ~40% lower server load.

philosophy.title: Ship in safe increments
philosophy.detail: Monolith to 10+ services, data-store migrations, national health-system integrations — decomposed into small, reversible steps so releases stay calm and recoverable.

philosophy.title: Design for the next engineer
philosophy.detail: If a system can't be understood and debugged by someone who didn't write it, it isn't production-ready. Clear service boundaries beat clever abstractions.
